title: Birthday Milestones Trivia
description: Regular and Cards Against Humanity style clues about milestone birthdays

clues.clue: This age marks when most teens can legally drive in the USA
The legal voting age in the United States
Legal drinking age in the United States
First major milestone where 'adulting' really begins
The age of the midlife crisis cliché
Golden anniversary of half a century
When retirement planning becomes a real concern
Traditional full retirement age in many countries
When 'getting older' becomes undeniable
Age when most people qualify for senior discounts everywhere
Sweet ___ party celebrates this milestone
Officially becoming an adult in most Western countries
When you stop lying about your age at bars
Age when your knees start making noise when you stand up
When you realize your life didn't go according to plan
Age when you finally stop caring what people think
The new forty, allegedly
Time to collect Social Security benefits
When airplane seat recline becomes a priority
Age for AARP membership eligibility
Year of the learner's permit and unlimited freedom
When you can legally sign contracts without parental consent
Age for renting a car without surcharges
Quarter-century marker plus five years
Double your teens equals this milestone
Half a century of existence
Triple your twenties
When most people trade office hours for nap time
Age when you finally understand what your parents were talking about
When showing up to an event counts as an accomplishment
The age when you think you can parallel park like you own the road, but you're actually a menace to society
The moment you realize your parents didn't know what they were doing either
When you finally understand why your dad drinks so much
Age when you realize student loans will chase you until the grave
The perfect age to buy a sports car to cope with your terrible life choices
When your knees hurt more than your ex's Instagram hurts your feelings
The age when your parents start asking you for tech support, but you Google it too
When you finally have time to yell at clouds, but TikTok teenagers ruin it
The age when a good bowel movement feels like a major accomplishment
When your medication list is longer than your actual to-do list
The age when you're invincible on social media but absolutely terrified your mom will find your browsing history
When you can vote for the same person your parents despise
The age when you're still too poor to afford good alcohol, so you drink gas station wine
When your friends with kids stop responding to group texts from 2015
The age where TikTok makes you feel ancient, but you're still not ready for a flip phone
When you realize your Spotify Discover Weekly has devolved into classic rock and lo-fi beats
The age when you ask the barista what the WiFi password is instead of just asking for coffee
When your grandkids finally understand why you complain about the weather constantly
The age when you've seen enough government scandals to be perpetually disappointed
When your browser history is just WebMD articles about things that probably aren't actually wrong
The moment you think you're cool enough to ignore your parents, but you're not paying bills yet
When you can legally get arrested for stuff your parents used to do in high school
The age when hangovers last a week and your liver starts filing a complaint
When your Instagram transitions from party pics to kitchen renovation photos
The age when your back goes out more than you do
When your kids become embarrassed by your TikTok dance attempts
The age when Amazon Prime is your only joy and Costco trips are your social life
When you finally have time to write angry letters, but nobody reads physical mail anymore
The age when you've forgotten so much useful information you're basically a storage unit
When you qualify for discounts on everything except the healthcare you actually need
